commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the OpenAI-compatible completions stream to parse complete DeepSeek DSML invoke text into synthetic toolCall blocks gated by declared tool names, while preserving native tool_calls and adding regression tests.

PR surface: Source +474, Tests +791. Total +1265 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. The linked issue has live provider evidence, and current main shows DSML text is stripped or streamed as text while only native choiceDelta.tool_calls become executable toolCall blocks; I did not run a credentialed Foundry repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer live-provider proof plus boundary acceptance, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: fix(agents): recover DeepSeek DSML tool calls
target.body:
Fixes #85918

## Summary

- Recover complete DeepSeek DSML invoke blocks on the OpenAI-compatible completions stream when tools were actually exposed and the invoke name matches a declared tool.
- Preserve the existing DSML visible-text stripping behavior, prefer native `tool_calls` when present, and cap retained DSML bodies.
- Add regression coverage for parameter semantics, split chunks, native-shadow de-dupe, trailing text ordering, disabled/unknown tools, malformed DSML, tool-choice narrowing, structured thinking, and oversized DSML bodies.

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_HEAVY_CHECK_LOCK_SCOPE=worktree OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/deepseek-text-filter.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/deepseek-text-filter.ts src/agents/deepseek-text-filter.test.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts`
- `git diff --check upstream/main..HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main`

Behavior addressed: DeepSeek/Foundry completions streams that emit complete DSML tool-call markup as assistant text now become executable tool calls instead of visible/filtered text, while native `tool_calls` remain authoritative.

Real environment tested: Local source checkout rebased onto current `upstream/main`, with focused Vitest coverage for the OpenAI completions stream and DeepSeek DSML filter.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_HEAVY_CHECK_LOCK_SCOPE=worktree OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/deepseek-text-filter.test.ts`; `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/deepseek-text-filter.ts src/agents/deepseek-text-filter.test.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts`; `git diff --check upstream/main..HEAD`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main`.

Evidence after fix: Tests assert recovered parameter, JSON, zero-argument, split-chunk, native-shadow, trailing-text, disabled-tool, unknown-tool, malformed-parameter, pinned-tool-choice, structured-thinking, multi-tool ordering, and oversized-body cases.

Observed result after fix: Focused Vitest shards passed; formatting and whitespace checks passed; branch autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: Live Microsoft Foundry/DeepSeek provider call; no provider credentials used.
